rural_min_site_area: 0.2 hectares (0.5 acres) (DMS-45); 0.202 hectares (0.5 acres) rural infill (DMS-54)
sightline_y: 60 m local tertiary; 90 m local secondary; 120 m local primary; 150 m regional; 230 m national (DMS-97)
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice on Wastewater Treatment and Disposal Systems serving Single Houses (October 2009) (DMS-44/51)
residential_density_dph: Determined with reference to Sustainable Residential Development Guidelines 2009 and prevailing scale/pattern (no fixed uph table)
separation_distance_m: 22 m between directly opposing rear first floor windows (DMS-13); 2.5 m single storey / 3 m two-storey between side walls (DMS-14)
private_open_space: 48 m² (1 bed); 55 m² (2 bed); 60 m² (3 bed); 75 m² (4+ bed) (DMS-18)
public_open_space_pct: 15% greenfield; 10% brownfield/large infill (DMS-21); within 150 m walking distance
car_parking_dwelling: House (outside town centre): 2 per unit; House (town/village centre): 1 per unit; Apartment: 1 per unit + 1 visitor per 4 (DMS-102)
trigger_AA: All plans/projects subject to screening for Appropriate Assessment; full AA (NIS) unless screening establishes no likely significant effect on Natura 2000 site
trigger_EIA: Mandatory thresholds per Planning and Development Regulations 2001; sub-threshold EIAR where likely significant effects
trigger_FRA: Site-specific FRA for areas at moderate to high flood risk; Development Management Justification Test applied (DMS-106)
trigger_AHIA: Protected Structures (DMS-93); Architectural Heritage Assessment report (DMS-94); ACAs (DMS-95)
trigger_EcIA: Ecological Impact Assessment among non-exhaustive list of other assessments
trigger_VIA: Visual Impact Assessment / Landscape Character Assessment among other assessments
trigger_TTA: Detailed TTA where significant effect on travel demand/capacity per TII TTA Guidelines 2014 thresholds (DMS-105)
notes: DMS-46 road frontage min 30 m; DMS-98 junction distances 50/100/150 m local/regional/national. No plot ratio, site coverage or building height tabulated. EV: min 10% spaces with EV charging (DMS-104).
